# EMPLOYMENT OFFER LETTER

**Date:** _________, 2026
**To:** Adewale Okonkwo
**From:** BrightPath Nigeria Ltd. (the "Employer")

**1. APPOINTMENT**
BrightPath Nigeria Ltd. is pleased to offer you the position of Business Strategy Lead, commencing on the agreed start date.

**2. REMUNERATION**
Your gross annual salary is ₦1,800,000 (one million eight hundred thousand Naira), payable monthly in arrears.

**3. STATUTORY DEDUCTIONS**
3.1 PAYE income tax will be deducted from each monthly salary payment in accordance with the Personal Income Tax Act.
3.2 Pension contributions will be remitted in accordance with the Pension Reform Act 2014: employer 10%, employee 8% of monthly emoluments.
3.3 NSITF contributions will be remitted monthly under the Employees' Compensation Act 2010 (1% of monthly emoluments, employer-borne).
3.4 NHF contributions will be remitted under the NHF Act 1992 (2.5% of monthly salary, employee-deducted).
3.5 ITF contribution will be paid by the Employer annually under the ITF Act (1% of annual payroll).

**4. ANNUAL LEAVE**
Twenty-one (21) working days per calendar year, in accordance with the Employer's leave policy.

**5. PROBATION**
Six (6) months' probation from the start date.

**6. TERMINATION**
Notice periods per the Labour Act s.11 minimum (1 week up to 3 months' service; 2 weeks for 3 months–2 years; 4 weeks thereafter) OR payment in lieu.

**7. GOVERNING LAW**
Federal Republic of Nigeria.

**SIGNED** for the Employer: ____________________
**ACCEPTED** by the Employee: ____________________
